title: Red Hat Security Advisory: openssl security update
overview:
An update for openssl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 Update Services for SAP Solutions and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: openssl security update

An update for openssl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 Update Services for SAP Solutions and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for openssl is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 Update Services for SAP Solutions and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 Telecommunications Update Service.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
openssl-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.src.rpm
openssl-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
openssl-debuginfo-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.i686.rpm
openssl-debuginfo-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
openssl-debugsource-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.i686.rpm
openssl-debugsource-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
openssl-devel-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.i686.rpm
openssl-devel-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
openssl-libs-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.i686.rpm
openssl-libs-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
openssl-libs-debuginfo-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.i686.rpm
openssl-libs-debuginfo-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
openssl-perl-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.x86_64.rpm
openssl-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
openssl-debuginfo-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
openssl-debugsource-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
openssl-devel-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
openssl-libs-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
openssl-libs-debuginfo-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm
openssl-perl-1.1.1k-15.el8_6.ppc64le.rpm

CVE-2025-69419: A flaw was found in OpenSSL. When processing a specially crafted PKCS#12 (Personal Information Exchange Syntax Standard) file, a remote attacker can exploit an out-of-bounds write vulnerability. This issue, occurring within the OPENSSL_uni2utf8() function, leads to memory corruption by writing data beyond its allocated buffer. Successful exploitation could result in a denial of service or potentially allow for arbitrary code execution.
